description: Add comprehensive regression tests for iteration 2 fixes
steps: Create tests/test_iteration2.py with the following test cases:

test_all_personas_clamp_score_0_10: For each of the 18 agents, call analyze() with extreme positive inputs (pe=1000, gross_margins=2.0, revenue_growth=5.0) and extreme negative inputs (pe=-5, roe=-1, gross_margins=-0.5, debt_ratio=2.0). Assert 0 <= score <= 10 for every result.
test_all_personas_zero_context: Create a MarketContext with all defaults (ticker='ZERO', everything else 0). Analyze with all agents. Assert no exception and all scores in [0,10].
test_munger_no_division_by_zero: Test Munger with price=0 and earnings_growth=0. Assert no exception.
test_dalio_no_division_by_zero: Test Dalio with price=0. Assert no exception.
test_coordinator_empty_results: Call get_consensus({}) and assert it returns neutral with score 0.
test_coordinator_all_error_results: Create results dict where every agent has SignalType.ERROR and coverage_confidence=0. Call get_consensus() and assert no ZeroDivisionError.
test_coordinator_consensus_score_clamped: Verify consensus score is always in [0, 10] even with extreme agent scores.
test_mcp_ticker_validation: Import mcp_server._build_context, call augur_analyze with ticker='<script>alert(1)</script>' (via direct call), verify it returns an error string.
test_dayu_momentum_ordering: Test that DayuAgent handles change_pct=-15 correctly (should get score-=2 not -=1).
acceptance_criteria: All new tests pass with python -m pytest tests/test_iteration2.py -v
Tests genuinely exercise the code paths fixed in this iteration
findings: Created tests/test_iteration2.py with 12 test functions across 5 test classes: TestPersonaScoreClamping (3 tests), TestDivisionByZeroGuards (3 tests), TestDayuMomentumOrdering (2 tests), TestCoordinatorEdgeCases (3 tests), TestMCPValidation (1 test). All 12 new tests pass. Full suite: 98 passed.
